message.content:
Read the full content of these files in d:\intelligent-coding-assistant\backend and report every line exactly:

1. src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/service/KnowledgeRetrievalService.java
2. src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/service/ChatService.java
3. src/main/resources/application.yml
4. src/main/resources/schema.sql
5. pom.xml
6. src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/config/ (list all files and read each one)
7. src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/entity/ (list all files, read 2-3 representative ones to understand the pattern)
8. src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/controller/ (list all files, read ChatController.java fully)
9. src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/dto/ (list all files)

Report the FULL content of files 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 and ChatController.java. For others just list filenames and key patterns.
